final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-scene
Asset type: editorial illustration, square crop
Primary request: fresh Japanese-style cherry blossom season campus scene with a schoolgirl in sailor uniform standing in front of a school building, petals falling, gentle breeze, bright sunshine, youthful atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: Japanese high school campus exterior, school building facade in background, cherry blossom trees lining the path, soft bokeh of pink petals in the air
Subject: young schoolgirl in classic white-and-navy sailor uniform (セーラー服), long hair gently blown by breeze, soft smile, standing naturally in front of the school building
Style/medium: Japanese anime-inspired illustration, clean linework, soft watercolor-like coloring, shoujo manga aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium full-body shot, slight low-angle, subject centered with cherry blossom canopy overhead
Lighting/mood: bright warm spring sunlight, soft golden-hour glow, cheerful and nostalgic, youthful and refreshing
Color palette: soft pink cherry blossoms, white and navy sailor uniform, pale blue sky, warm golden sunlight, light green foliage accents
Materials/textures: smooth illustration finish, delicate petal scatter, soft fabric folds on uniform, flowing hair strands
Avoid: dark or gloomy atmosphere, overly sexualized pose, deformed hands, cluttered background
